name: Internal Audit Checklist - Vendor Controls.pdf
text:
[Page 1]
Meridian Holdings  Frontend Demo Grounded Corpus
AUD-101  Internal Audit Checklist
Controlled synthetic enterprise document — for retrieval, review, and workflow testing.
Page 1
DOCUMENT CONTROL
Internal Audit Checklist — Vendor Controls
Q1 2024 internal audit review of the Northwind engagement.
Document ID
AUD-101
Owner
Internal Audit
Audit Period
Q1 2024
Entity Reviewed
Northwind Cloud Systems LLC
Status
Fieldwork complete
Synthetic corporate document for demo, evaluation, and retrieval workflows only. All parties, people, systems, repositories, and events are
fictional.
Audit Objective
Assess whether Northwind control design and retained evidence align with Meridian policy requirements, contractual
commitments, and operational oversight expectations for the planned production deployment.
Checklist Results
Control Test
Expected Evidence
Result
Reviewer Note
Signed DPA on file
Executed DPA with transfer
terms
Partial
DPA executed, but Appendix C (SCCs) is not
attached.
Privileged access approval
evidence complete
Approval email + owner
sign-off for vendor admins
Fail
Approval record for two standing vendor admin
accounts not in evidence vault.
Incident-notification obligation
aligned to policy
Explicit 24-hour or 48-hour
clause
Fail
Contract and policy still rely on “reasonable
efforts” or undefined timing.
Subprocessor change
workflow documented
Formal notice process and
objection path
Partial
Portal update only; formal notice package
requested.
SLA availability target aligned
to business criticality
99.95% monthly or approved
exception
Partial
Current SLA at 99.5%; temporary risk
acceptance proposed.
Conclusion: control design is partially adequate, but evidence quality and contract alignment gaps require
remediation before full close-out.
